name: multi-bespoke attach combining plays, practice, and dfs-salaries
description: Composes two or more bespoke-attach sources at differing grains in one query: plays (player_year aggregation), practice (player_week), and dfs-salaries (player_week). Coverage gap (c).
expected_query: with "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by COALESCE(bc_pid)), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t13f9bf4556d499997cf3acea4cc0b3d9" as (select "player_salaries"."pid", "player_salaries"."salary", "nfl_games"."year", "nfl_games"."week" from "player_salaries" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_salaries"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" where "player_salaries"."source_id" in ('DRAFTKINGS') and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_REG_WEEK_1')) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "t0ffdb4d66181b3ca6e1508633a1071b5"."w" AS "player_practice_designation_w_0", "t13f9bf4556d499997cf3acea4cc0b3d9"."salary" AS "dfs_salary_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" on "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "practice" as "t0ffdb4d66181b3ca6e1508633a1071b5" on "t0ffdb4d66181b3ca6e1508633a1071b5"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t0ffdb4d66181b3ca6e1508633a1071b5"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_REG_WEEK_1') left join "t13f9bf4556d499997cf3acea4cc0b3d9" on "t13f9bf4556d499997cf3acea4cc0b3d9"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by player.fname, player.lname, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays", "t0ffdb4d66181b3ca6e1508633a1071b5"."w", "t13f9bf4556d499997cf3acea4cc0b3d9"."salary", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
